title: [Song Sung Blue, Entry]
description: Woad-blue canvas walls curve upward to a ceiling where branches are lashed into place, their surfaces tangled with trailing vines that gather near the tent's crown like a living canopy.  Cauldron-topped braziers glow at measured intervals, the heated water within filling the air with steam and humid warmth.  Verdant wool rugs spread across the ground in mimicry of grass, while carved hollows cradle carefully woven nests.  Resting near a chain-strung dark woad blue flap, an ornate gilded perch is surrounded by a bit of mist and loose feathers.
